summary: REQ-1 appears implemented by importing and including the existing LiveSiteSection component in the main App layout. No evidence in the provided diff summary suggests changes to the LiveSiteSection behavior itself; the change is focused on surfacing it in the UI. Some ancillary metadata/documentation files were modified that were not part of the BuildRequest requirements.

hallucinated_features.description: Updated internal project tracking metadata (project_state.json) to add/track the feature request status.
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest only asked to render an existing UI section in the main app page; it did not request changes to project tracking/metadata files.

hallucinated_features.description: Updated/maintained a repository-wide frontend file summary document.
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest did not ask for documentation or inventory updates; this file is not needed to satisfy REQ-1.
